prompt: A warm, highly detailed anime-style illustration set in a cozy, cluttered indie workspace that feels like a book café mixed with a startup studio, lit by golden afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windows on the right and by 4 black industrial pendant lamps hanging from the ceiling, with string lights, overflowing bookshelves, plants, and handwritten motivational signs covering the background. Show 5 young women standing around a large wooden worktable, framed as a wide group portrait. The mood is whimsical, slightly satirical, and aspirational-but-chaotic. On the far left, place a tall woman with very long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="auburn"} hair wearing a crown of white daisies and a sleeveless rust-brown dress with a white sunburst emblem on the chest and a dark belt at the waist; she holds a small handwritten note toward the viewer that reads exactly {argument name="note text" default="Claude is asking for your permission"}. In front of her on a side table is a glass cup of tea, a book stack, and a tiny potted plant. Next to her, place a punky blonde woman with twin ponytails tied with black bows, large black headphones resting around her neck, and an off-shoulder black dress marked with a bold white X on the torso; she stands confidently beside an open sticker-covered laptop with another large X logo. In the center rear, place a mysterious slim girl with extremely long dark navy-black hair, pale skin, and a gothic dark dress, standing quietly in front of a desktop monitor showing a blue glowing star or sparkle on a dark screen. To the right of center, place an elegant woman in a fitted red cheongsam-inspired dress with floral embroidery and a side slit, leaning one hand on the wooden table near an open notebook filled with sketches or writing. On the far right, place a casually dressed brunette with messy hair in a bun, wearing a white T-shirt with a black knot-like AI logo under an open beige overshirt, standing behind an open silver laptop with the same logo. Scatter many cozy desk objects across the main table: 2 mugs, 1 open notebook, 1 pen, 1 small black figurine, 1 closed book stack, and laptops. Add readable handwritten wall notes and signs throughout the room: “FOCUS SHIPS DREAMS” on the upper left, “SHIPPING IS MY CARDIO” on the left wall, “turn caffeine into code” near the top center, “be kind to your future self” near the window, “The Art of Asking Nicely” on a book spine at lower left, “WORLD’S OKAYEST MODEL” on a black mug near center-left, “MOONSHOT DIARIES” on a book stack near lower right, “Good Prompts Only” on a mug at lower right, and a sticky note at the bottom right reading “AGI is already for ready us” with a small doodle. Use painterly linework, intricate textures, expressive fashion styling, warm brown and amber color grading, soft cinematic depth, and a polished social-media-viral illustration aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一幅温馨且细节丰富的动漫风格插画，背景设定在一个舒适而略显杂乱的独立工作室，融合了书店咖啡馆与初创公司工作室的氛围。午后的金色阳光从右侧的高窗洒入，天花板上悬挂着 4 盏黑色工业风吊灯，背景中点缀着串灯、堆满书籍的书架、绿植以及手写的励志标语。画面呈现 5 位年轻女性围站在一张大型木质工作台前，构图为广角集体照。整体氛围既异想天开又带有一丝讽刺意味，既充满抱负又略显混乱。最左侧是一位身材高挑、留着长波浪 {argument name="hair color" default="赤褐色"} 头发的女性，她头戴雏菊编织的花环，身穿带有白色太阳纹徽章的锈棕色无袖连衣裙，腰间系着深色腰带；她向观众展示一张手写便条，上面写着 {argument name="note text" default="Claude is asking for your permission"}。她身旁的边桌上放着一杯茶、一叠书和一盆小绿植。在她旁边，是一位朋克风格的金发女性，扎着系有黑色蝴蝶结的双马尾，脖子上挂着大号黑色耳机，身穿露肩黑色连衣裙，胸前印有醒目的白色 X 标志；她自信地站在一台贴满贴纸、印有同样 X 标志的笔记本电脑旁。画面中央后方，是一位神秘的瘦削女孩，留着极长的深海军蓝黑色长发，皮肤白皙，身穿哥特风深色连衣裙，安静地站在一台显示器前，屏幕上闪烁着蓝色的星光。右侧中央，是一位优雅的女性，身穿修身的红色旗袍式连衣裙，带有花卉刺绣和侧开叉，单手撑在木桌上，身旁放着一本打开的笔记本，上面画满了草图或文字。最右侧是一位穿着随意的棕发女性，头发凌乱地盘成发髻，身穿印有黑色结状 AI 标志的白色 T 恤，外搭一件米色衬衫，站在一台印有相同标志的银色笔记本电脑后。主桌上散落着许多温馨的办公用品：2 个马克杯、1 本打开的笔记本、1 支笔、1 个黑色小手办、1 叠合上的书和几台笔记本电脑。房间各处点缀着清晰可见的手写墙面笔记和标语：左上方写着“FOCUS SHIPS DREAMS”，左墙上写着“SHIPPING IS MY CARDIO”，顶部中央附近写着“turn caffeine into code”，窗户附近写着“be kind to your future self”，左下方书脊上写着“The Art of Asking Nicely”，左中位置的黑色马克杯上写着“WORLD’S OKAYEST MODEL”，右下方书堆上写着“MOONSHOT DIARIES”，右下方马克杯上写着“Good Prompts Only”，右下角的便利贴上写着“AGI is already for ready us”并配有一个小涂鸦。采用绘画感线条、复杂的纹理、极具表现力的时尚造型、温暖的棕色与琥珀色调、柔和的电影级景深，以及精致的社交媒体病毒式传播插画美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: Cozy AI Agents Studio 合影：一幅温馨的动漫风格插画，描绘了五位拟人化的 AI 助手在阳光明媚的创意工作室内相聚的场景，非常适合作为编辑类模因、社交媒体帖子或关于 Agent 文化的概念艺术。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
